debug_info.goal:
case pos
x : IGame
p : Player
y : IGame
hy : y ∈ moves p x
z : IGame
hz : z ∈ @IGame.reverseSet x y p
h : @IGame.Reversible x y p
⊢ ¬@IGame.Reversible (@IGame.unreverse x) (@IGame.unreverse z) p

failed_attempts:
intro hrev
    cases p
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩ := hrev
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have hwx' : w' ≤ x := (unreverse_equiv w').symm.le.trans (hwx.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)
      rw [reverseSet] at hw'
      split_ifs at hw' with h'
      · exact lf_right hw' (hwx'.trans (h.choose_le.trans h'.le_choose))
      · subst hw'
        exact mt h.choose_le.trans' (lf_right hy' hwx')
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩ := hrev
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have hwx' : x ≤ w' := (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hwx.trans (unreverse_equiv w').le)
      rw [reverseSet] at hw'
      split_ifs at hw' with h'
      · exact left_lf hw' (h'.choose_le.trans (h.le_choose.trans hwx'))
      · subst hw'
        exact mt h.le_choose.trans (left_lf hy' hwx')
  · exact h ∘ (Reversible.equiv (unreverse_equiv x).symm (unreverse_equiv y).symm p).mp

rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
    exact not_reversible_unreverse (mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h hy hz)
  · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] at hz
    simp at hz
    subst hz
    intro hrev
    have h' := unreverse_equiv x
    have h'' := unreverse_equiv y
    cases p
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hle⟩ := hrev
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨z, hz, ⟨w, hw', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [reversible_left] at h
      refine h ⟨z, hz, (unreverse_equiv w).le.trans (hle.trans h'.le)⟩
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hle⟩ := hrev
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨z, hz, ⟨w, hw', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [reversible_right] at h
      refine h ⟨z, hz, h'.ge.trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv w).ge)⟩
termination_by x
decreasing_by igame_wf

rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
    rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
    rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw

    split_ifs at hw with h'
    · exact not_reversible_unreverse (mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h hy hz) ⟨_, mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h' hy' hw, hle⟩
    · subst hw; cases p <;> [exact (hle.trans h.choose_le).not_lt (lf_right hy'); exact (h.le_choose.trans hle).not_lt (left_lf hy')]

    rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv, reverseSet] at hle hw

      have h₁ := (unreverse_equiv w').le.trans (hwx.trans ((unreverse_equiv x).le.trans h.choose_le))
      rw [reverseSet] at hw'
      split_ifs at hw' with h'
      · exact (h₁.trans (lf_of_left_le h.choose_spec.1 (h'.choose_spec.1.choose_mem_moves hy'))).false

    · obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw', rfl⟩⟩ := by simpa [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] using hw

      rw [reverseSet] at hw'
      split_ifs at hw' with h'
      · exact (lf_of_right_le h.choose_spec.1 (h'.choose_spec.1.choose_mem_moves hy') |> (h₁.trans ·).false)
      · subst hw'
        exact h₁.not_gf (lf_of_right_le h.choose_spec.1 hy')
  · sorry

cases p
    · rintro ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw, rfl⟩⟩ := moves_unreverse .. ▸ hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hw'
      have hx : x ≤ h.choose := by
        rw [le_iff_forall_lf]
        refine ⟨fun u hu ↦ ?_, fun u hu ↦ ?_⟩
        · obtain ⟨u, hu, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := moves_unreverse .. ▸ hu
          grw [unreverse_equiv]; rw [reverseSet] at hv
          split_ifs at hv with h'
          · exact fun hu' ↦ lf_right hv (hu'.trans h'.choose_le |>.trans h.choose_le)
          · subst hv; exact mt h.choose_le.trans' (lf_right hu)
        · exact lf_of_right_le (unreverse_equiv u).le (mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h hy u)
      replace hw' := hw'.trans hx
      rw [reverseSet] at hw
      split_ifs at hw with h'
      · exact lf_right hw (hw'.trans h'.choose_le)
      · subst hw; exact lf_right hy' (hw'.trans hz.le)
    · rintro ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw, rfl⟩⟩ := moves_unreverse .. ▸ hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hw'
      have hx : h.choose ≤ x := by
        rw [le_iff_forall_lf]
        refine ⟨fun u hu ↦ ?_, fun u hu ↦ ?_⟩
        · exact lf_of_le_left (unreverse_equiv u).ge (mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h hy u)
        · obtain ⟨u, hu, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := moves_unreverse .. ▸ hu
          grw [unreverse_equiv]; rw [reverseSet] at hv
          split_ifs at hv with h'
          · exact fun hu' ↦ left_lf hv (h.le_choose.trans h'.choose_le |>.trans hu')
          · subst hv; exact mt h.le_choose.trans (left_lf hu)
      replace hw' := hx.trans hw'
      rw [reverseSet] at hw
      split_ifs at hw with h'
      · exact left_lf hw (h'.le_choose.trans hw')
      · subst hw; exact left_lf hy' (hz.ge.trans hw')
  · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] at hz
    subst hz
    exact not_reversible_unreverse (mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible hy h)
termination_by x
decreasing_by all_goals exact subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (‹_› : Subtype _).2 _ (‹_› : _ ∈ reverseSet ..)

rintro h'
    cases p <;> rw [Reversible, Player.cases_left, Player.cases_right] at h' ⊢
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw'', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have : w' ≤ x := (unreverse_equiv _).le.trans (hw'.trans (unreverse_equiv _).ge)
      have h_choose := h.choose_spec
      rw [reverseSet] at hw''
      split_ifs at hw'' with h_rev
      · exact lf_right hw'' ((this.trans h_choose.2).trans h_rev.le_choose)
      · subst hw''; exact mt h_choose.2.trans' (lf_right hy' this)
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw'', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have : x ≤ w' := (unreverse_equiv _).le.trans (hw'.trans (unreverse_equiv _).ge)
      have h_choose := h.choose_spec
      rw [reverseSet] at hw''
      split_ifs at hw'' with h_rev
      · exact left_lf hw'' (h_rev.choose_le.trans (h_choose.2.trans this))
      · subst hw''; exact mt h_choose.2.trans (left_lf hy' this)
  · sorry

cases p <;> rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
    · have := (unreverse_equiv z).trans (h.choose_le.trans' (left_lf (by aesop)).le) |>.trans (unreverse_equiv x).symm
      exact (le_def.1 this).1 w hw hle
    · have := (unreverse_equiv x).trans (h.le_choose.trans (lf_right (by aesop)).le) |>.trans (unreverse_equiv z).symm
      exact (le_def.1 this).2 w hw hle
  · sorry

cases p <;> rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
    · have hle' : w ≤ unreverse h.choose := hle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le |>.trans (unreverse_equiv h.choose).ge
      have hw' : w ∈ (unreverse h.choose).moves right := by
        rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂]
        exact ⟨z, hz, hz, hw, rfl⟩
      exact not_reversible_unreverse (moves_unreverse h.choose left ▸ Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ⟨z, hz, unreverse z, hz, rfl⟩) ⟨w, hw, hle'⟩
    · have hle' : unreverse h.choose ≤ w := (unreverse_equiv h.choose).le |>.trans (unreverse_equiv x).ge |>.trans hle
      have hw' : w ∈ (unreverse h.choose).moves left := by
        rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂]
        exact ⟨z, hz, hz, hw, rfl⟩
      exact not_reversible_unreverse (moves_unreverse h.choose right ▸ Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ⟨z, hz, unreverse z, hz, rfl⟩) ⟨w, hw, hle'⟩
termination_by x
decreasing_by all_goals exact subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (‹_› : Subtype _).2 z.2

rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
    intro hrev
    obtain ⟨w, hw, hle⟩ := hrev
    rw [unreverse_equiv, h.choose_spec.2] at hle
    cases p
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hle'⟩ := hrev
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, ⟨w, hw, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv] at hle'
      exact (hle'.trans h.choose_le).not_gf (z.lf_right_of_mem_moves_left hz ha)
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hle'⟩ := hrev
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, ⟨w, hw, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv] at hle'
      exact (h.le_choose.trans hle').not_gf (z.left_lf_of_mem_moves_right hz ha)
  · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hz
    subst hz
    intro hrev
    obtain ⟨z, hz', hle⟩ := hrev
    rw [unreverse_equiv] at hle
    exact h (p.cases ⟨z, by aesop, hle⟩ ⟨z, by aesop, hle⟩)
termination_by x
decreasing_by igame_wf

obtain ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ := h.choose_spec
    cases p
    · rintro ⟨v, hv, hv'⟩
      obtain ⟨v, hv, v', hv', rfl⟩ := by rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hv; exact hv
      rw [reverseSet] at hv'
      split_ifs at hv' with h'
      · exact lf_right hv' (((unreverse_equiv v').le.trans hv').trans (hw'.trans h'.le_choose))
      · subst hv'; exact lf_right hv (hw'.trans (unreverse_equiv _).ge |> (unreverse_equiv _).le.trans hv' |> mt)
    · rintro ⟨v, hv, hv'⟩
      obtain ⟨v, hv, v', hv', rfl⟩ := by rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hv; exact hv
      rw [reverseSet] at hv'
      split_ifs at hv' with h'
      · exact left_lf hv' (h'.choose_le.trans (hw'.trans (hv'.trans (unreverse_equiv v').ge)))
      · subst hv'; exact left_lf hv (hw'.trans' (unreverse_equiv _).le |> (unreverse_equiv _).ge.trans hv' |> mt)

intro h'
    cases p
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, ⟨b, hb, rfl⟩⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 hw
      grw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hwx
      rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
      exact (left_lf hz).not_le (h.choose_le.trans (lf_right hb (hwx.trans (subposition_of_mem_reverseSet ha hb).le_choose)))
    · obtain ⟨w, hw, hxw⟩ := h'
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, ⟨b, hb, rfl⟩⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 hw
      grw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hxw
      rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
      exact (lf_right hz).not_le ((h.choose_spec.2.trans (subposition_of_mem_reverseSet ha hb).choose_le).trans hxw).ge

cases p <;> intro ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩
    · obtain ⟨z', hz', hzx⟩ := h.choose_spec
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨w', hw', w'', hw'', rfl⟩ := hw
      have := (unreverse_equiv w'').le.trans (hwx.trans (unreverse_equiv x).ge)
      exact (this.trans (Reversible.choose_le ⟨w', hw', this⟩)).not_lt (lf_right hw')
    · obtain ⟨z', hz', hzx⟩ := h.choose_spec
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨w', hw', w'', hw'', rfl⟩ := hw
      have := (unreverse_equiv x).le.trans (hwx.trans (unreverse_equiv w'').ge)
      exact (Reversible.le_choose ⟨w', hw', this⟩ |>.trans this).not_lt (lf_left hw')
  · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] at hz
    cases hz
    exact not_reversible_unreverse (mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible hy h)
termination_by x
decreasing_by igame_wf

cases p <;> rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
    · rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨z1, hz1, ⟨w, hw, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      grw [unreverse_equiv] at hle
      rw [reverseSet] at hw
      split_ifs at hw with h'
      · exact (lf_right hw) ((hle.trans h.choose_le).trans h'._)
      · subst hw
        exact (hle.trans h.choose_le).not_gf (lf_right hz1)
    · rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨z1, hz1, ⟨w, hw, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      grw [unreverse_equiv] at hle
      rw [reverseSet] at hw
      split_ifs at hw with h'
      · exact (lf_right hw) (h'._.trans (h.le_choose.trans hle))
      · subst hw
        exact (h.le_choose.trans hle).not_gf (left_lf hz1)
  · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] at hz
    cases hz
    exact not_reversible_unreverse (mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible hy h)
termination_by x
decreasing_by all_goals exact subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (‹_› : Subtype _).2 z.2

cases p <;> rintro ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩
    · rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨w, hw, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have hvx : v ≤ x := (unreverse_equiv v).le.trans hwx
      rw [reverseSet] at hz
      split_ifs at hz with h'
      · exact (lf_right hw ((hvx.trans h'.choose_le).trans h.choose_le)).not_gt (lf_right hw (h'.choose_le.trans (h.choose_le.trans' (lf_left hz))))
      · subst hz
        exact (lf_right hw (hvx.trans h.choose_le)).not_gt (lf_right hw (h.choose_le.trans' (lf_left (h.choose_mem_moves))))
    · rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨w, hw, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have hxv : x ≤ v := hwx.trans (unreverse_equiv v).le
      rw [reverseSet] at hz
      split_ifs at hz with h'
      · exact (lf_left hw (h.le_choose.trans (h'.le_choose.trans hxv))).not_gt (lf_left hw (h'.le_choose.trans' (h.le_choose.trans (lf_right hz))))
      · subst hz
        exact (lf_left hw (h.le_choose.trans hxv)).not_gt (lf_left hw (h.le_choose.trans (lf_right (h.choose_mem_moves))))
  · exact h ∘ (Reversible.equiv unreverse_equiv unreverse_equiv (equiv_refl _)).1

cases p
    · rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw'', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hle
      rw [reverseSet] at hw''
      split_ifs at hw'' with h'
      · exact (lf_right hw'').not_le ((hle.trans h.choose_le).trans h'.le_choose)
      · subst hw''
        exact (lf_right hy').not_le (hle.trans h.choose_le)
    · rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw'', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hle
      rw [reverseSet] at hw''
      split_ifs at hw'' with h'
      · exact (left_lf hw'').not_ge (h'.choose_le.trans (h.le_choose.trans hle))
      · subst hw''
        exact (left_lf hy').not_ge (h.le_choose.trans hle)

cases p
    · rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, ⟨b, hb, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have hle' := (unreverse_equiv b).le.trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)
      rw [reverseSet] at hb
      split_ifs at hb with h'
      · exact not_reversible_unreverse (mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h' ha hb)
          ⟨_, mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h hy hz, hle'⟩
      · subst hb
        exact (lf_right ha).not_ge (h.choose_le.trans' hle')
    · rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, ⟨b, hb, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have hle' := (unreverse_equiv x).le.trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv b).le)
      rw [reverseSet] at hb
      split_ifs at hb with h'
      · exact not_reversible_unreverse (mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h' ha hb)
          ⟨_, mem_moves_unreverse_of_reversible h hy hz, hle'⟩
      · subst hb
        exact (lf_left ha).not_le (h.le_choose.trans hle')
  · exact h ∘ (reversible_equiv (unreverse_equiv x) (unreverse_equiv y)).mpr
termination_by x
decreasing_by all_goals exact subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (‹_› : Subtype _).2 z.2

intro hr
    obtain ⟨w', hw', hle⟩ := hr
    rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw'
    obtain ⟨w, hw, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw'
    rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hle
    rw [reverseSet] at hv
    split_ifs at hv with h'
    · cases p
      · exact lf_right hv ((hle.trans h.choose_le).trans h'.le_choose)
      · exact left_lf hv (h'.choose_le.trans (h.le_choose.trans hle))
    · cases p
      · exact hle.not_lt (h.choose_le.trans_lt' (lf_left (lf_right hw)))
      · exact hle.not_lf (lf_right (lf_left hw) |>.trans_le h.le_choose)
  · sorry

cases p <;> rintro ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩
    · rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have hle := (unreverse_equiv v).le.trans hw' |>.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le
      rw [reverseSet] at hv
      split_ifs at hv with h'
      · exact lf_right hv (hle.trans (h.choose_le.trans h'.le_choose))
      · subst hv; exact lf_right ha (hle.trans h.choose_le)
    · rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨a, ha, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have hle := (unreverse_equiv x).le.trans hw' |>.trans (unreverse_equiv v).ge
      rw [reverseSet] at hv
      split_ifs at hv with h'
      · exact lf_left hv (h'.choose_le.trans (h.le_choose.trans hle))
      · subst hv; exact lf_left ha (h.le_choose.trans hle)

rcases p with (_|_) <;> rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
    · exact (unreverse_equiv w).le.trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).ge) |>.not_gt
        (h.choose_le.trans_lt (lf_right (moves_unreverse .. ▸ hw) (unreverse_equiv z).le))
    · exact (unreverse_equiv x).le.trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv w).ge) |>.not_gt
        (left_lf (moves_unreverse .. ▸ hw) (unreverse_equiv z).ge |>.trans_le h.choose_le)
  · rcases p with (_|_) <;> rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
    · exact h ⟨w, (moves_unreverse .. ▸ hw), hle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).ge |>.trans (unreverse_equiv y).le⟩
    · exact h ⟨w, (moves_unreverse .. ▸ hw), (unreverse_equiv y).ge |>.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le |>.trans hle⟩
termination_by x
decreasing_by igame_wf

cases p <;> rintro ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩
    · rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      short
      grw [unreverse_equiv w', unreverse_equiv x] at hw'
      rw [reverseSet] at hw'
      split_ifs at hw' with h'
      · exact (left_lf hz).not_ge (hw'.trans (h.choose_le.trans h'.le_choose))
      · exact (left_lf hz).not_ge (hw'.trans h.choose_le)
    · rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw', rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      short
      grw [unreverse_equiv x, unreverse_equiv w'] at hw'
      rw [reverseSet] at hw'
      split_ifs at hw' with h'
      · exact (lf_right hz).not_le (h'.choose_le.trans (h.le_choose.trans hw'))
      · exact (lf_right hz).not_le (h.le_choose.trans hw')
  · cases p <;> rintro ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩ <;> rw [moves_unreverse] at hw <;>
      obtain ⟨y', hy', ⟨w', hw', rfl⟩⟩ := hw <;>
      short <;>
      grw [unreverse_equiv w', unreverse_equiv x] at hw' <;>
      rw [reverseSet] at hw' <;>
      split_ifs at hw' with h'
    · exact h ⟨y', hw'.trans h'.le_choose⟩
    · exact h ⟨y', hw'⟩
    · exact h ⟨y', h'.choose_le.trans hw'⟩
    · exact h ⟨y', hw'⟩
termination_by x
decreasing_by igame_wf

cases p
    · rw [reversible_left]; rintro ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw; obtain ⟨w, hw, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hwx
      rw [reverseSet] at hv; split_ifs at hv with hr
      · exact lf_right hv ((hwx.trans h.choose_le).trans hr.le_choose)
      · subst hv; exact mt h.choose_le.trans' (lf_right hw hwx)
    · rw [reversible_right]; rintro ⟨w, hw, hxw⟩
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw; obtain ⟨w, hw, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hxw
      rw [reverseSet] at hv; split_ifs at hv with hr
      · exact lf_left hv (hr.choose_le.trans (h.le_choose.trans hxw))
      · subst hv; exact mt h.le_choose.trans (left_lf hw hxw)
  · cases p
    · subst hz; rw [reversible_left]; rintro ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hwx
      exact h ⟨_, mem_moves_of_mem_moves_unreverse hw, hwx⟩
    · subst hz; rw [reversible_right]; rintro ⟨w, hw, hxw⟩
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hxw
      exact h ⟨_, mem_moves_of_mem_moves_unreverse hw, hxw⟩
termination_by x
decreasing_by igame_wf

cases p
    · rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨w', hw', ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have : v ≤ x := (unreverse_equiv v).le.trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)
      rw [reverseSet] at hv
      split_ifs at hv with h'
      · exact (lf_right hv ((this.trans h.choose_le).trans h'.le_choose)).false
      · subst hv
        exact (h.choose_le.trans' (lf_right hw').le).not_le this
    · rintro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨w', hw', ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      have : x ≤ v := (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv v).ge)
      rw [reverseSet] at hv
      split_ifs at hv with h'
      · exact (lf_left ((h'.choose_le.trans (h.le_choose.trans this)).trans (lf_left hv).le)).false
      · subst hv
        exact (lf_left hw').not_le (h.le_choose.trans this)
